volume_info.title: Metal Physics & Reflective Surfaces
volume_info.description: Interaction of light with conductive materials (Chrome, Steel, Aluminum).

metallic_constants.fresnel_effect: Strong at grazing angles. Highlights become 100% reflective at edges.

material_types.name: Polished Chrome / Mirror Steel
material_types.visual_note: Perfect for premium bottle caps and high-end machinery parts.

material_types.name: Brushed Aluminum / Industrial Steel
material_types.visual_note: Best for industrial canisters and heavy-duty PetroJac equipment.

reflection_logic.glint_control: Zero white-out pixels on metallic edges.
